title: Opt out of requiring country code for phone number column
excerpt: One of my colleagues has a form that he wants to request the client’s phone number on, but it’s cumbersome to request the country code as well. All of our clients are in one state within the U.S., so there really isn’t a…

posts.author: gilliankelly (Gillian Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml: One of my colleagues has a form that he wants to request the client’s phone number on, but it’s cumbersome to request the country code as well. All of our clients are in one state within the U.S., so there really isn’t a need for the country code. It would be nice to be able to opt out of including that in the form. We’ve tried to use Number/Text columns instead, but those don’t work as well for a phone number.

posts.author: dhurst (Dan Hurst)
posts.cookedHtml: We have the same need. The form is imbedded on our website and the country field requires the click in it to submit the form even though its set to autofill to the USA. Really need ability to just turn this off or not show it
